ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain (e.g., forest, desert, urban) */,
  "size_x" INTEGER /* Width of the map in game units */,
  "size_y" INTEGER /* Height of the map in game units */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the map (e.g., public, private, beta) */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity of the map */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map where the scenario takes place */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "initial_conditions" TEXT /* Initial conditions for the scenario */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives to be achieved in the scenario */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Constraints or rules that apply to the scenario */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who created the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathfinding_data" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each path */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario to which the path belongs */,
  "tcost" REAL /* Total cost of the path */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the path */,
  "expect" REAL /* Expected value of the path */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the path */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Number of retries or attempts */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Pathfinding algorithm used (e.g., A*, Dijkstra) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pathfinding data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the pathfinding data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathfinding_data_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., infantry, vehicle, air) */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the unit */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the unit */,
  "speed" REAL /* Movement speed of the unit */,
  "resource_cost" INTEGER /* Resource cost to produce the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "range" REAL /* Attack range of the unit */,
  "sight" REAL /* Sight range of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., gold, wood, food) */,
  "initial_amount" INTEGER /* Initial amount of the resource */,
  "max_amount" INTEGER /* Maximum amount of the resource */,
  "production_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the resource is produced */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource is renewable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Player preferences (e.g., UI settings, game options) */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player joined */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in minutes */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game session (e.g., win, lose, draw) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit movement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit being moved */,
  "start_position" TEXT /* Starting position of the unit (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "end_position" TEXT /* Ending position of the unit (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the movement */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the movement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movement (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathfinding data used for the movement */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the movement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_movements_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES pathfinding_data ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_movements_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_movements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource transaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource involved */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the resource transacted */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., production, consumption, transfer) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., production, consumption, transfer) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the transaction (e.g., player, building, unit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_transactions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_transactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., unit_movement, resource_transaction, player_interaction) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Coordinates or location of the event */,
  "affected_entities" TEXT /* Entities affected by the event (e.g., units, resources) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario simulation */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario being simulated */,
  "simulation_params" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., AI, player) */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the simulation in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_simulations_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of the achievement (e.g., level_up, mission_completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_level" TEXT /* Level of the achievement (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the achievement was earned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
